payload.key_insight: NVIDIA's explosive data center demand growth (+75% YoY) and explicit confirmation that 'the agentic AI inflection point has arrived' with 'enterprise adoption of agents skyrocketing' directly validates Palantir's core AI platform (AIP) demand thesis, as PLTR's revenue growth is highly correlated with enterprise AI software spend that follows GPU infrastructure investment. The scale and breadth of enterprise AI deployments described — spanning defense, energy, pharma, and cloud — maps closely to Palantir's target customer verticals, suggesting a robust pipeline environment for PLTR's forward estimates.
specific_quotes: Computing demand is growing exponentially — the agentic AI inflection point has arrived... Enterprise adoption of agents is skyrocketing. Our customers are racing to invest in AI compute — the factories powering the AI industrial revolution and their future growth.
Revealed that NVIDIA Blackwell Ultra delivers up to 50x better performance and 35x lower cost for agentic AI compared with the NVIDIA Hopper platform.
Joined the U.S. Department of Energy's Genesis Mission as a private industry partner to support U.S. AI leadership in key areas including energy, scientific research and national security.
